description.content: Operations for accessing artifacts from pipeline runs

Returns a list of artifacts published by a specific pipeline run. Artifacts can include compiled binaries, test results, container images, or any other files published using the PublishBuildArtifacts or PublishPipelineArtifact task.

REST API for managing pipelines and pipeline runs in Azure DevOps. Provides programmatic access to create, list, run, and monitor CI/CD pipelines defined as YAML files in source repositories. Supports triggering runs with custom variables, parameters, and stage selections.
